data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for attribution expiry window support.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Attribution expiry window support' requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for an attribution expiry window, yet there are no prior steps or evidence that directly address this aspect. This indicates a lack of concrete evidence to support the validation of the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of attribution expiry window support.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the attribution expiry window support.
